text.tspan: A DSL + code-generation system: one closed Pydantic model is the source of truth; every other artifact is generated from it or checked against it by a wall of CI gates.
SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH · Document (Pydantic v2)
extra="forbid" — unknown keys are hard errors
membership · every type named in prose
orchestrator: type dispatch · page layout · flow pagination · text-fit
font_metrics (fontTools/fc-match) · golden lock = SHA-256 per page (deterministic)
1 · Canonical Renderer is a 2.4K-LOC monolith in tooling/ the SDK depends UP into — inverted layering;
hexagonal extraction stopped at the orchestrator.
2 · Drift surface: grammar + spec are hand-maintained VIEWS, held only by membership/enum gates — looser than
3 · Style is one ~100-field closed CSS bag; TextStyle / StrokeStyle alias it — broad surface, only partly
4 · Two paradigms: absolute page-mode vs naive flow-mode pagination — separate engines, no shared layout model;
